examples: We've already mentioned the insulating effect of snow.
Heat could be retained as debris fall back into impact craters, creating an insulating blanket.
The snow, which blankets the ground in the winter, actually has an insulating effect on the soil beneath it.
It wasn't long ago that bipartisan and international consensus centered on insulating the Internet from regulation.
If you're building a house from scratch, consider insulating it with straw bales or even denim.
